case_title: COSMOPOLITAN APARTMENTS LIMITED, A CALIFORNIA vs. DAVIS, RODNEY L et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF COSMOPOLITAN APARTMENTS LIMITED, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, RODNEY L
